UpDownAnimation.seeWhyClientsKeepComingBack: See Why Clients Keep Coming Back

LeftRightAnimation.title: Don't take our word for it.

ContactRightContent.shareEnquiry: Share your enquiry and Teresa will reply as soon as she can — usually within 24 hours.
ContactRightContent.messagePlaceholder: Dates, hospitality, vibe, allergies — whatever helps Teresa prepare.
ContactRightContent.noSpam: No spam — just a thoughtful reply when she is back at her desk.

LoginFormNoImage.title: Login
LoginFormNoImage.description: Enter your email below to login to your account
LoginFormNoImage.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

LoginFormWithImage.title: Login to your account
LoginFormWithImage.description: Enter your email below to login to your account
LoginFormWithImage.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

EmailVerificationForm.title: Check your email
EmailVerificationForm.description: We sent a verification code to {email}. Enter it below to continue.
EmailVerificationForm.codeHint: Enter the 8-digit code from your email.
EmailVerificationForm.verificationFailed: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.

PasswordResetForm.descriptionRequest: Enter the email for your account. We will send you a one-time code you can use to choose a new password.
PasswordResetForm.descriptionReset: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it below along with your new password. The code is valid for 5 minutes.

HospitalityData.managedReservationsDescription: Guests request a reservation time through the app. You can review and accept or decline each request, so every request is recorded in your dashboard.

StaySharingCode.title: Let your room companions in
StaySharingCode.body: Anyone staying with you can scan the room QR code, then enter this sharing code.
StaySharingCode.privacy: Share this code only with people in your accommodation.

StayJoinAccessForm.title: Join an unlocked stay
StayJoinAccessForm.activeTitle: Someone has already unlocked this stay
StayJoinAccessForm.body: If you are staying together, enter the sharing code from their partners page to open the same benefits on this device.
StayJoinAccessForm.directBody: Already staying with someone who has unlocked partners? Ask for the sharing code shown on their stay page.
StayJoinAccessForm.label: Sharing code
StayJoinAccessForm.hint: The code appears at the top of the unlocked stay page.
StayJoinAccessForm.invalid: That sharing code is invalid or has expired.
StayJoinAccessForm.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
StayJoinAccessForm.unavailable: Could not check that code. Check your connection and try again.
StayJoinAccessForm.scanInstead: You can also scan the QR code in your room to start a new stay.

StayEmpty.title: Stay not found
StayEmpty.body: This QR points to a stay that isn’t active. Double-check the code or ask your host.

StayPartnershipsEmpty.title: No partners linked yet
StayPartnershipsEmpty.body: Your host hasn’t connected this stay to a partner hospitality yet. Ask them about it — they can add partners in seconds.

StayError.title: Couldn’t load your partners
StayError.body: Check your connection and try again.

StayPartnershipsError.title: Couldn’t load your partners
StayPartnershipsError.body: Check your connection and try again.

StayExpiredAccess.title: Your stay session has expired
StayExpiredAccess.body: Scan the QR in your room to unlock your partners again.

StayPartnershipsSection.partnersLead: Show this page to staff at any partner hospitality. No app, no account.

HospitalityPage.heroLeadFallback: A {companyName} partner hospitality — see your guest perk below.
HospitalityPage.perkFootnote: The exact offer depends on which {companyName} stay you scan from.
HospitalityPage.perkFallbackLine2: Staff confirm the stay with one tap.
HospitalityPage.perkFallbackLine3: Discount follows what’s agreed for your stay.
HospitalityPage.redeemTitle: Three quick steps at the door.
HospitalityPage.redeem1Title: Scan the QR at the entrance.
HospitalityPage.redeemBody1: Opens the perk list for your exact stay. {venueName} appears when your host has linked this hospitality.
HospitalityPage.redeemBody2: Your host confirms the stay — no printouts, no extra app.
HospitalityPage.redeem3Title: The offer is applied at the till.
HospitalityPage.redeemBody3: Pay however the hospitality accepts; the perk follows what your {companyName} page shows.
HospitalityPage.reserveBulletPhone: Call to ask about availability or to reserve.
HospitalityPage.reserveNoChannels: No phone number is listed yet.
HospitalityPage.partnerNo: Not accepting perks at the moment
HospitalityPage.staysLead: Guests of these {companyName} stays get a perk here. Scan the QR in your room to see your specific offer.
HospitalityPage.staysFootnote: {venueName} offers this for guests of linked {companyName} stays.
HospitalityPage.staysEmpty: When hosts connect their places to this hospitality, they’ll show up here.
HospitalityPage.ctaStripTitle: The QR journey from start to finish.
HospitalityPage.ctaStripLead: Explore {companyName} from home — scan at the door for the full perk list.
HospitalityPage.footerDisclaimer: Names and offers on this page come from your listings.

HospitalityError.title: Couldn’t load this page
HospitalityError.body: Check your connection and try again.

HospitalityEmpty.title: Hospitality not available
HospitalityEmpty.body: This hospitality page is missing or no longer active.
HospitalityEmpty.notPartneredTitle: Hospitality not included with this stay
HospitalityEmpty.notPartneredBody: This accommodation is not partnered with this hospitality. Open a hospitality from your stay partners list instead.

SignUpFormNoImage.title: Create an account
SignUpFormNoImage.description: Enter your information below to create your account
SignUpFormNoImage.emailHelp: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email with anyone else.
SignUpFormNoImage.passwordHelp: Must be at least 8 characters long.
SignUpFormNoImage.signUpFailed: We couldn't create your account. Check your details and try again, or sign in if you already have one.

SignUpFormWithImage.title: Create your account
SignUpFormWithImage.description: Fill in the form below to create your account
SignUpFormWithImage.emailHelp: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email with anyone else.
SignUpFormWithImage.passwordHelp: Must be at least 8 characters long.
SignUpFormWithImage.signUpFailed: We couldn't create your account. Check your details and try again, or sign in if you already have one.

LocalizedCalendar.title: Book an appointment
LocalizedCalendar.description: Select the dates for your appointment

UploadFileMultiple.dropzoneDescription: Use the drop zone to add files — it stays put while previews show in a grid below. Remove any file with the
UploadFileMultiple.instruction: control on the top-right of each preview card
UploadFileMultiple.placeholder: Uploaded files. Drop more files here to add.

UploadFileSingle.dropzoneDescription: Choose or drop a file, preview it, then save. Use
UploadFileSingle.existingCoverHint: Pick a new file below to replace it on save.
UploadFileSingle.ifYouChangeYourMind: on the file card if you change your mind.
UploadFileSingle.placeholder: File preview. Drop a file here to replace.

AccommodationQrDialog.title: QR for {name}
AccommodationQrDialog.description: Print this code in the unit. Guests scan it to unlock perks for this stay.
AccommodationQrDialog.localhostWarning: PUBLIC_SITE_URL points to localhost. Printed codes will not work for real guests until you set your production domain.

DataTable.selectAllRowsOnThisPage: Select all rows on this page
DataTable.emptyDescription: Nothing to show yet. Try adjusting filters or add new data.

AlertDialogButton.title: Action cannot be reversed
AlertDialogButton.description: Are you sure you want to do this? This action cannot be undone.

AdminAccommodationsPage.title: Accommodations
AdminAccommodationsPage.description: Places guests stay — apartments, hotels, villas, and more. Each row gets an auto-generated scan token for printed QRs.
AdminAccommodationsPage.caption: Accommodations

AdminAccommodationAddPage.title: Add accommodation
AdminAccommodationAddPage.description: Create a new property. A secret scan token for the wall QR is generated automatically.
AdminAccommodationAddPage.sectionBasicsDescription: What guests and staff will see at a glance.
AdminAccommodationAddPage.sectionLocationDescription: Used on the guest scan landing page and admin filtering.
AdminAccommodationAddPage.sectionCoverDescription: Shown on the guest scan landing page. PNG or JPG recommended; aim for a wide aspect ratio.
AdminAccommodationAddPage.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on the benefits page (optional).
AdminAccommodationAddPage.fieldIsActiveDescription: Inactive accommodations stay in the database but their QR page won't render benefits.

EditAccommodationPage.title: Edit accommodation
EditAccommodationPage.description: Update how this stay appears to guests. The in-room QR code stays the same.
EditAccommodationPage.notFoundDescription: This stay may have been removed or is not assigned to your account.
EditAccommodationPage.loadErrorDescription: Please try again in a moment.
EditAccommodationPage.sectionGuestAccessDescription: The QR code is tied to this unit. Print it from here if you need a new copy.
EditAccommodationPage.sectionBasicsDescription: What guests and staff will see at a glance.
EditAccommodationPage.sectionLocationDescription: Shown on the guest benefits page.
EditAccommodationPage.sectionCoverDescription: Leave empty to keep the current image. PNG or JPG recommended.
EditAccommodationPage.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on the benefits page (optional).
EditAccommodationPage.fieldIsActiveDescription: Inactive accommodations stay in the database but their QR page won't render benefits.

AdminPartnershipsPage.title: Partnerships
AdminPartnershipsPage.description: Links between accommodations and partner hospitalities. Each row is one perk guests unlock after scanning the in-room QR.
AdminPartnershipsPage.caption: Partnerships

AdminPartnershipAddPage.title: Add partnership
AdminPartnershipAddPage.description: Connect a stay to a partner hospitality. Guests of that accommodation see the offer after scanning the QR.
AdminPartnershipAddPage.sectionPartnersDescription: Paste Convex document IDs from the accommodations and hospitalities admin lists.
AdminPartnershipAddPage.selectAccommodationTruncated: Showing the first {count} — add more from the accommodations admin list.
AdminPartnershipAddPage.selectHospitalityTruncated: Showing the first {count} — add more from the hospitalities admin list.
AdminPartnershipAddPage.sectionOfferDescription: Optional percent-off; leave blank for non-percent perks.
AdminPartnershipAddPage.fieldDiscountDescription: Shown on the guest perks list when set.
AdminPartnershipAddPage.fieldActiveDescription: Inactive partnerships stay in admin but guests won't see them.

AdminHospitalitiesPage.title: Hospitalities
AdminHospitalitiesPage.description: Partner hospitalities — dining, experiences, and services linked to accommodations via partnerships.
AdminHospitalitiesPage.caption: Hospitalities

AdminHospitalityAddPage.title: Add hospitality
AdminHospitalityAddPage.description: Register a new partner hospitality. You can edit any field later.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.sectionBasicsDescription: What guests will see in the benefits list.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.sectionLocationDescription: Used for the public benefits page and admin filtering.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.sectionContactDescription: Phone number guests can use to contact this hospitality.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.sectionCoverDescription: Shown on the public benefits page. PNG or JPG recommended; aim for a wide aspect ratio.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on the benefits page (optional).
AdminHospitalityAddPage.fieldIsActiveDescription: Inactive hospitalities stay in the database but won't appear in benefit lists.

EditHospitalityPage.title: Edit hospitality
EditHospitalityPage.description: Update how your hospitality appears to guests on partner benefit pages.
EditHospitalityPage.notFoundDescription: This hospitality may have been removed or is not assigned to your account.
EditHospitalityPage.loadErrorDescription: Please try again in a moment.
EditHospitalityPage.sectionBasicsDescription: What guests will see in the benefits list.
EditHospitalityPage.sectionLocationDescription: Shown on your public hospitality page.
EditHospitalityPage.sectionContactDescription: Phone number guests can use to contact this hospitality.
EditHospitalityPage.sectionCoverDescription: Leave empty to keep the current image. PNG or JPG recommended.
EditHospitalityPage.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on the benefits page.
EditHospitalityPage.fieldIsActiveDescription: Inactive hospitalities stay in the database but won't appear in benefit lists.

SearchInput.tooManyRequests: Too many search requests. Please try again shortly.
SearchInput.rateLimitKeyUnavailable: Search rate limit key could not be resolved.
SearchInput.rateLimitNotConfigured: Search rate limit is not configured.
SearchInput.clientAddressRequired: Client address is required for public search.

SearchPage.title: Search input
SearchPage.description: Search public test rows through the remote source.

AdminUsersPage.title: Users
AdminUsersPage.description: Search, filter, and manage user accounts.
AdminUsersPage.caption: Users

AdminUserAddPage.title: Add user
AdminUserAddPage.description: Create an account that can later own accommodations or hospitalities.
AdminUserAddPage.sectionAccountDescription: Use the person's real name and the email they will sign in with.
AdminUserAddPage.sectionCredentialsDescription: Set a temporary password. The user can change it after signing in.
AdminUserAddPage.fieldPasswordDescription: Use at least 8 characters and share it through a private channel.
AdminUserAddPage.sectionAccessDescription: Keep the default user role unless this account should manage the admin area.
AdminUserAddPage.fieldEmailVerifiedDescription: Enable only when you have already confirmed this address. Otherwise the user must verify before signing in.

UserSessions.title: Active sessions
UserSessions.description: Devices currently signed in. Revoking signs the device out immediately.

UserAccounts.title: Linked accounts
UserAccounts.description: Sign-in providers connected to this user.

UserActivity.title: Activity
UserActivity.description: Audit log entries scoped to this user. Newest first.
UserActivity.caption: Activity

UserDangerZone.title: Danger zone
UserDangerZone.description: Account-level actions. Changes here are audited and may be irreversible.
UserDangerZone.removeAdmin: Remove admin privileges from this account.
UserDangerZone.grantAdmin: Grant admin privileges to this account.
UserDangerZone.liftBan: Lift the ban so the user can sign in again.
UserDangerZone.signOutPrevent: Sign the user out and prevent further sign-ins.
UserDangerZone.deleteRowDescription: Permanently remove this user, their sessions, and linked provider accounts. This cannot be undone.

BanUserDialog.title: Ban {email}
BanUserDialog.description: The user is signed out and cannot sign in again until unbanned. The optional reason is shown on next sign-in attempt.

ChangeRoleButton.demoteDescription: Are you sure you want to do this? The user will immediately lose admin privileges.
ChangeRoleButton.promoteDescription: Are you sure you want to do this? The user will gain full admin privileges, including the ability to ban and delete other accounts.

DeleteUserDialog.title: Delete {email}?
DeleteUserDialog.description: This is permanent and cascades to sessions and accounts. Type the email below to confirm.
DeleteUserDialog.adminDescription: Admins must be demoted to "user" before they can be deleted.

UserPageEmpty.title: User not found
UserPageEmpty.description: The user you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been deleted.

UserPageError.title: Failed to load user
UserPageError.description: Something went wrong while fetching this user. Please try again.

PasswordResetVerifyForm.codeFormat: Use the 8-digit code from your email.
PasswordResetVerifyForm.passwordTooCommon: That password is too common. Please choose a stronger one.

SignUpForm.passwordTooCommon: That password is too common. Please choose a stronger one.

EmailVerificationForm.codeFormat: Use the 8-digit code from your email.

CreatePartnershipSchema.discountRange: Discount must be between 1 and 100, or leave blank.

GenericMessages.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least {min} characters.
GenericMessages.PASSWORD_TOO_COMMON: That password is too common. Please choose a stronger one.
GenericMessages.STORAGE_DELETE_FAILED: Couldn't delete the file from storage. Nothing was removed.
GenericMessages.UPLOAD_SAVE_FAILED: Could not save the uploaded file. Please try again.
GenericMessages.YOU_NEED_TO_CORRECT_FORM_ERRORS: You need to correct form errors
GenericMessages.BATCH_TOO_LARGE: Too many items in a single request (max {limit}).
GenericMessages.FORBIDDEN: You're not allowed to perform this action.
GenericMessages.ADMIN_CANNOT_BE_DELETED: Admins can't be deleted. Demote to "user" first.
GenericMessages.ACCOMMODATION_SCAN_TOKEN_FAILED: Could not generate a scan token. Please try again.
GenericMessages.ACCOMMODATION_CANNOT_DELETE_ACTIVE_GUEST: This accommodation cannot be deleted. There is an active guest in it using the app, please wait for it to expire and then try again!
GenericMessages.GUEST_SHARING_CODE_INVALID: That sharing code is invalid or has expired.
GenericMessages.RESERVATION_ALREADY_PROCESSED: This reservation has already been processed.
GenericMessages.PARTNERSHIP_PAIR_EXISTS: This accommodation is already linked to that hospitality.
GenericMessages.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please try again later.
GenericMessages.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS_SECONDS: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds}s.
GenericMessages.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS_MINUTES: Too many requests. Try again in {minutes} min.
